log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Leonin — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Leonin — Winged Striker HP: 45/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Leonin — Winged Striker.
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:8+3=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
